goal: Prove XR focused -> 2D panel focused -> same XR app focused again without ADB foreground switching in the product path.

strategyCandidates.label: direct-pending-intent
strategyCandidates.path: XR app -> 2D panel -> same XR app via mq.returnPendingIntent

strategyCandidates.label: chainlink-trigger-router
strategyCandidates.path: XR app -> ChainLink mq.command=trigger -> 2D panel -> ChainLink -> XR app

strategyCandidates.label: legacy-caller-component
strategyCandidates.path: XR app -> 2D panel -> explicit caller package/activity

localGates: builder-smoke emits awe-great-dictator-handoff.config.json and ChainLink plan
questionnaire APK generation runs with local Android render preview
temporal tracer local render preview passes
Unity video asset gate confirms H.264 yuv420p/AAC and nonblack sampled frames
Unity editor render gate sees nonblack video frame
questEvidence: bounded logcat with trigger, pause, resume, panel completion, and export markers
foreground sequence: XR -> questionnaire -> XR -> temporal tracer -> XR
questionnaire export JSON/CSV pulled from app external files
temporal tracer SVG/CSV/JSON pulled from app external files
ChainLink state/events only when Candidate B is under test
